content.en:
Emperor Fengyang was also stunned, didn't it take long for the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor to become the Dao Ancestor, how could he be so powerful?

Thundercloud Dao Ancestor is also a Five-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he is also the best among the Five-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestors!

He panicked!

His most powerful guard now is the Thundercloud Dao Ancestor, and the other Dao Ancestors are relatively weak, and they are not enough for the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors to fight alone.

Thundercloud Dao Ancestor couldn't move at the moment, and hurriedly begged for mercy: "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, spare your life!"

"Spare your life?" Ye Tian said coldly: "If I don't come, won't my son die at your hands, and you dare to beg for mercy?"

As soon as the words fell.

Ye Tian urged the power of the dark forbidden to continuously invade the body of the Thundercloud Dao Ancestor, and also performed a great thousand Dao technique-Soul Golden Bell Technique!

I saw that an illusory soul golden bell appeared in Ye Tianmei's heart, rushing into the soul sea of the Thundercloud Dao Ancestor, and constantly vibrating in his soul sea.

"Ahhh!!h

Lei Yun Dao Ancestor screamed, he felt as if his soul was about to be shattered, no, it was really shattered, but relying on the strong tenacity and recovery of Dao Ancestor's soul, it began to heal again.

And just like that, heal, shatter, heal again......

As time passed, the aura of the Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor became lower and lower.

Ye Tian accelerated the time around him, and it seemed that a long time had passed, but in the eyes of the outside world, only a moment had passed.

Suddenly.

The aura of the Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor disappeared completely, his soul was shattered, and his physical body was also shattered under the erosion of the dark forbidden power.

Thundercloud Dao Ancestor, fall!

After the fall of the Thundercloud Dao Ancestor, the Fengyang Emperor was trembling all over, and he didn't even dare to look at the Wanfa Dao Ancestor, nor did he dare to run away, for fear that if he moved, he would be killed by the Wanfa Dao Ancestor immediately.

Subsequently, Ye Tian accelerated time for Ye Xingchen and allowed him to quickly complete the transformation.

Not long after, Ye Xingchen completed his transformation and officially became a Supreme True Ancestor.

"Thank you, father!"

Ye Xingchen said.

"You're my son, how could I not make a move!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Immediately, Ye Tian said again: "You are very good this time, you are about to break through in battle, I thought it would take you a long time to step into the Supreme True Ancestor, but I didn't expect you to become the Supreme True Ancestor so quickly!

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen nodded.

The other side.

Emperor Fengyang hurriedly said: "I admit defeat, admit defeat!"

Where did he dare to fight with Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingchen is now the Supreme True Ancestor, even if he has just broken through, the improvement in strength is not very exaggerated, but he was not Ye Xingchen's opponent before, and now he is not an opponent.

"I'm sorry, I don't accept your admission of defeat!"

Ye Xingchen said coldly.

Before, Emperor Fengyang ordered Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor to kill him, how could he possibly let Emperor Fengyang go?

"Help me stop him!"

Emperor Fengyang ordered his own escort Dao Ancestors.

However, at this moment, these guardian Dao Ancestors were locked by Ye Tian.

"Move, die!"

Ye Tian threatened.

A Dao Ancestor moved, and Ye Tian's Forbidden Spear directly pierced his body, nailing him to death in the void.

At this time, the other Dao Ancestors did not dare to move.

And Ye Xingchen also came to the Fengyang Emperor, holding the Xingchen Blade and slashing over.

Emperor Fengyang was already injured, his injuries had not yet recovered, his combat strength was not at the peak, and his strength was incomparably huge with Ye Xingchen, and he couldn't defend against Xingchen Blade with all his might.

Poof!

Emperor Fengyang's body was almost directly cut into two pieces, and he was injured again.

Puff puff!!!

The Xingchen Blade slashed again and again, and the Fengyang Emperor couldn't compete at all, and wanted to escape, but the speed was not as fast as Ye Xingchen.

Of course, he also wanted to use the escape class treasure to escape, but Ye Xingchen cast the forbidden realm and cast a bondage type middle thousand dao technique, so that he had no way to escape at all, unless he had a forbidden strange object similar to the forbidden void leaf.

But where does he have such a treasure!

Feeling that death was coming, Emperor Fengyang hurriedly moved out of his backstage: "Ye Xingchen, I am the emperor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, even if it is your father Wanfa Dao Ancestor, he is just an ant in front of the Heavenly Emperor Palace! If you kill me, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will be furious, and your human race will be destroyed!"

Ye Xingchen was not threatened by Emperor Fengyang's words in the slightest, his father had already said that he would bear all the consequences.

Father didn't even stop him, why did he want to stop?

Burst!

The Star Blade slashed through the fluctuations of the Wind Yang Emperor, and a big head flew out.

Then, Ye Xingchen performed the Middle Thousand Dao Technique-Xingchen Divine Spear, and with a single blow of the Xingchen Divine Spear, he directly pinned the head of the Fengyang Emperor.

Meanwhile.

The body of the Emperor of Fengyang was also constantly attacked by Ye Xingchen and completely shattered.

Now.

Emperor Fengyang's head was still roaring, and he was still not dead.

As an invincible true ancestor extreme powerhouse, the Fengyang Emperor is naturally not easy to kill, unless Ye Xingchen cultivates the forbidden technique and accumulates a period of time at the level of the Supreme True Ancestor, he has the ability to kill an invincible true ancestor extreme powerhouse in a short period of time.

After another moment, the Star Blade almost cut the head of the Emperor of the Wind Sun into countless pieces, and his soul was also cut into pieces, completely shattered.

At this time, Emperor Fengyang was truly dead.

It seems like a long time has passed, but in fact only ten minutes have passed.

When Emperor Fengyang fell, those Dao Ancestor guards of Emperor Fengyang didn't dare to move.

But Ye Tian knew very well that the Heavenly Emperor Palace must have known about the fall of the Fengyang Emperor at this time.

After all, Emperor Fengyang and those Dao Ancestor guards would notify the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and some of those onlookers would also contact the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Now, it is just waiting for the arrival of the powerful Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

---------------

Rumble!!!!!

The void shook, and a figure came out of nothingness, staring at Ye Tian with a pair of cold eyes, and said: "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, you human race is very bold, you dare to kill the emperor of our Heavenly Emperor Palace, don't you take our Heavenly Emperor Palace in your eyes!"

The one who came was the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace-Beacon Dao Ancestor, who was subordinate to the Heavenly Dragon Hall in the Heavenly Emperor Palace and controlled the war.

"There's only one Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He also thought that the Heavenly Emperor Palace would directly descend on a Supreme Dao Ancestor, and it seemed that an Emperor was not worthy of the Heavenly Emperor Palace to use the Supreme Dao Ancestor.

"Beacon Dao Ancestor, if the Emperor of Fengyang fights with my son normally, even if he is defeated, our human race will not help him. It's a pity that he can't afford to lose, so if he loses, he will order the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor to kill my son! Is it true that the emperor of your Heavenly Emperor Palace cannot lose, and whoever wins will be destroyed? Then in the future, doesn't it mean that if the people of your Heavenly Emperor Palace kill people and are killed, your Heavenly Emperor Palace will destroy other people's sects? If this is the case, your Heavenly Emperor Palace will be too domineering!"

Ye Tian sneered.

As soon as these words came out, they immediately resonated with many Dao Ancestors, and they secretly praised Ye Tian, and their eyes changed one by one when they looked at the Beacon Fire Dao Ancestors.
